title: Energy bow VFX (image+video reference)
content: Keep the character, jungle environment, camera movement, composition, action rhythm, and duration in unchanged. A blue-white energy bow and a glowing arrow from slowly appear in the character’s hands. The bow gradually coalesces from faint electric arcs and particles, featuring delicate flowing current textures, subtle volumetric light, and a stable energy outline. During the bow-drawing motion, a high-brightness energy arrow condenses at the center of the bowstring. At the exact moment the character releases, the arrow shoots out at high speed, leaving behind a bright, slender, continuous, and sharply defined energy trail.expand
